zh.lifeSummary: 當Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón於1319年9月5日出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達巴拉格爾時，他的父親Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon19歲，母親Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager20歲。他於1338年7月23日與Princesa Maria de Navarra Reina Consorte de Aragon在西班牙阿拉格昂札拉格薩阿拉格昂結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1387年1月6日在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿享年67歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納文波吉波布萊特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón于1319年9月5日出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達巴拉格爾时，他的父亲Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon19岁，母亲Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager20岁。他于1338年7月23日与Princesa Maria de Navarra Reina Consorte de Aragon在西班牙阿拉格昂札拉格薩阿拉格昂结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1387年1月6日在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿享年67岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納文波吉波布萊特。

nameMeanings.name: Pedro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón was born on 5 September 1319, in Balaguer, Lleida, Catalonia, Spain, his father, Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon, was 19 and his mother, Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager, was 20. He married Princesa Maria de Navarra Reina Consorte de Aragon on 23 July 1338, in Alagón, Zaragoza, Aragón, Spain. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 6 January 1387, in Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain, at the age of 67, and was buried in Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón est né le 5 septembre 1319, à Balaguer, Lleida, Catalunya, Espagne, son père, Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Princesa Maria de Navarra Reina Consorte de Aragon le 23 juillet 1338, à Alagón, Zaragoza, Aragón, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 6 janvier 1387, à Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón am 5. September 1319 in Balaguer, Lleida, Catalunya, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon 19 und seine Mutter Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager 20. Er hat am 23. Juli 1338 in Alagón, Zaragoza, Aragón, Spanien Princesa Maria de Navarra Reina Consorte de Aragon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Januar 1387 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien und wurde in Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón è nato il il 5 settembre 1319 nel Balaguer, Lleida, Catalunya, Spagna, il suo padre, Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Princesa Maria de Navarra Reina Consorte de Aragon il 23 luglio 1338, nel Alagón, Zaragoza, Aragón, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 6 gennaio 1387, nel Barcelona, Catalunya, Spagna, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalunya, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragónが1319年9月5日にスペインカタルニーアレイダボーアグエルで生まれた時，父Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragonは19歳，母Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Agerは20歳であった。1338年7月23日にスペインアラグoンザラゴザアラグoンでPrincesa Maria de Navarra Reina Consorte de Aragonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1387年1月6日にスペインカタルニーアバーセロナで67歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアターラゴナヴィンボドiポブレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón(이)가 1319년 9월 5일 스페인 카털니아 레이다 밸라구어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1338년 7월 23일 스페인 아라그o 자라고자 알라그o에서 Princesa Maria de Navarra Reina Consorte de Aragon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 1월 6일 스페인 카털니아 바셀나에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 터아라곤아 비보드i 포블렛에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón nasceu em 5 de setembro de 1319, em Balaguer, Lleida, Catalunya, Espanha, seu pai, Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Princesa Maria de Navarra Reina Consorte de Aragon em 23 de julho de 1338, em Alagón, Zaragoza, Aragón, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1387, em Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón родился 5 сентября 1319 г. в местности балагуир, ллида, каталуня, Испания, его отцу по имени Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Princesa Maria de Navarra Reina Consorte de Aragon 23 июля 1338 г. в местности алагoн, зарагоза, арагoн, Испания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 6 января 1387 г. в местности барселона, каталуня, Испания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности поблет, вимбодi, таррагона, каталуня, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón nació el 5 de septiembre de 1319, en Balaguer, Lérida, Cataluña, España, su papá, Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Princesa Maria de Navarra Reina Consorte de Aragon el 23 de julio de 1338, en Alagón, Zaragoza, Aragón, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 6 de enero de 1387, en Barcelona, Cataluña, España, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Poblet, Vimbodí, Tarragona, Cataluña, España.
